untranslatable_reason: Signal requires domain-specific commodity metrics (inventory levels, days-to-cover, supply arrival schedules, storage cost index) that are not available in standard OHLCV/technical indicator library. These fundamental/microstructure variables must be sourced from external commodity data feeds and cannot be derived from price/volume alone.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using price_pos_20 as proxy for inventory depletion (low percentile position) and hvol_20 as proxy for storage cost burden (high volatility regime). However, the core signal logic depends on: (1) absolute inventory levels vs 3-year percentiles, (2) days-to-cover ratio (inventory/daily_demand), (3) supply arrival schedule lead times (45+ days forward), and (4) storage cost index percentile. None of these can be accurately represented with standard technical indicators. A full implementation requires external data integration for commodity-specific fundamentals.
